const express = require("express"); const session = require("express-session"); const cors = require("cors"); const { createClient } = require("@supabase/supabase-js"); const path = require("path"); const app = express(); // ========================== // MIDDLEWARE // ========================== app.use(express.json()); // 🔥 حل مشكل session + fetch app.use(cors({ origin: "http://127.0.0.1:5500", // إذا تخدم بـ Live Server credentials: true })); app.use( session({ secret: "secret-key", resave: false, saveUninitialized: true, }) ); // 👇 يخدم HTML و CSS و JS app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname))); // ========================== // HOME // ========================== app.get("/", (req, res) => { res.sendFile(path.join(__dirname, "index.html")); }); // ========================== // SUPABASE // ========================== const supabase = createClient( "https://fbzyeemhuohhgpwihzru.supabase.co", "sb_secret_XXXX" ); // ========================== // REGISTER // ========================== app.post("/register", async (req, res) => { try { const { email, password, name, lastname, wilaya } = req.body; const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.signUp({ email, password, }); if (error) return res.json({ message: error.message }); const user = data.user; await supabase.from("users").insert([{ id: user.id, name: name + " " + lastname, email, wilaya, }]); res.json({ message: "User registered ✅" }); } catch (err) { console.error(err); res.json({ message: "Server error ❌" }); } }); // ========================== // LOGIN // ========================== app.post("/login", async (req, res) => { try { const { email, password } = req.body; const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({ email, password, }); if (error) return res.json({ message: error.message }); req.session.user = data.user; res.json({ message: "Login successful ✅" }); } catch (err) { console.error(err); res.json({ message: "Login error ❌" }); } }); // ========================== // GET PROPERTIES // ========================== app.get("/properties", async (req, res) => { try { const { data, error } = await supabase .from("properties") .select("*") .order("created_at", { ascending: false }); if (error) return res.json([]); res.json(data); } catch (err) { console.error(err); res.json([]); } }); // ========================== // ADD PROPERTY // ========================== app.post("/add-property", async (req, res) => { try { if (!req.session.user) { return res.json({ message: "Login required ❌" }); } const { description, city, type, price, image, surface, phone, operation } = req.body; const { error } = await supabase.from("properties").insert([{ description, city, type, price, image, surface, phone, operation, user_id: req.session.user.id }]); if (error) return res.json({ message: error.message }); res.json({ message: "Added ✅" }); } catch (err) { console.error(err); res.json({ message: "Error adding ❌" }); } }); // ========================== // DELETE // ========================== app.delete("/delete-property/:id", async (req, res) => { try { const { id } = req.params; const { error } = await supabase .from("properties") .delete() .eq("id", id); if (error) return res.json({ message: error.message }); res.json({ message: "Deleted ✅" }); } catch (err) { console.error(err); res.json({ message: "Delete error ❌" }); } }); // ========================== // START SERVER // ========================== app.listen(3000, () => { console.log("Server running on http://localhost:3000"); });
